dimensions.name: history.created_month
dimensions.label: History Created Month
dimensions.description: When an event in 'History' was created. Each event is linked to a query in Looker.

measures.name: history.count
measures.label: History Count
measures.description: This is a simple count of the primary key of the history table.

metadata.sql:
SELECT zz1.* FROM (
        SELECT
           @min_rank := IF(!_ct2, _rank, @min_rank) as m_rank
           , zz.*
        FROM (
        SELECT
           (@curType1 IS NOT NULL AND @curType1 = CAST(COALESCE(`history.created_month`,'') AS CHAR)) as _ct2
          , @curType1 := CAST(COALESCE(`history.created_month`,'') AS CHAR) as _ct1
          , xx.*
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM (
               SELECT
                     (
                        CASE CAST(COALESCE(`group.name`,'') AS CHAR)
                        WHEN @curType
                        THEN @curRow := @curRow + 1
                        ELSE @curRow := 1 AND @curType := CAST(COALESCE(`group.name`,'') AS CHAR) END
                      ) AS _rank,
                      ww.*
               FROM (
SELECT
    `group`.name AS `group.name`,
        (DATE_FORMAT(
            CONVERT(history.CREATED_AT USING utf8mb4)
           ,'%Y-%m')) AS `history.created_month`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT history.id) AS `history.count`
FROM history
LEFT JOIN user  AS user ON history.user_id = user.id
LEFT JOIN group_user ON user.id = group_user.user_id
LEFT JOIN  `group`   AS `group` ON `group`.id = group_user.group_id
GROUP BY
    1,
    2        ) as ww
        , (SELECT @min_rank := 1000000, @curType1 := NULL, @curRow :=0, @curType := '') r 
ORDER BY `group.name`, `history.created_month` DESC
        ) xx1
        ORDER BY `history.created_month`, _rank
        ) as xx
        ORDER BY `history.created_month`, _rank, _ct2
        ) as zz
        ORDER BY `history.created_month`, _rank, _ct2
        ) as zz1
WHERE m_rank <= 100 LIMIT 30000
